steps.title: Use the rectangle area formula
steps.content: For a rectangle, area equals length times width: $A=lw$. Substitute the given length $36$ centimeters and width $29$ centimeters.

steps.title: Use the rectangle area formula
steps.content: The area of a rectangle is length times width: $$A=lw.$$ Here the length is $36$ centimeters and the width is $29$ centimeters.

steps.title: State the units
steps.content: The area is 1044 square centimeters. The units are square centimeters because area measures two-dimensional space, so the answer is 1044.
